name: Escape the Space!
short_description: is a thrilling action-adventure game where you play as a space explorer stranded without fuel. Using a portal, you travel to another realm to collect and sell trash to refuel your spaceship.
detailed_description: Escape the space is a thrilling action-adventure game where you play as a space explorer. While on a journey through space, your spaceship runs out of fuel, forcing you to halt. Utilizing an operational portal, you transport to another realm where you must collect and sell trash to refuel your spaceship and continue your voyage. The game concludes once the spaceship is operational again.
about_the_game: Escape the space is a thrilling action-adventure game where you play as a space explorer. While on a journey through space, your spaceship runs out of fuel, forcing you to halt. Utilizing an operational portal, you transport to another realm where you must collect and sell trash to refuel your spaceship and continue your voyage. The game concludes once the spaceship is operational again.
